description: Create a Windows GitHub Actions CI workflow that triggers on push to master and version tags, and on pull requests. Run a job on a Windows 2022 environment that checks out the repository with submodules, installs Qt 6.8.3, configures and builds PokeFinder with CMake, runs tests with ctest, packages the build into a zip archive, uploads it as a GitHub Actions artifact, and publishes it as a release if the workflow is triggered by a tag.
